utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all five categories appear. Each one has detailed content: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health plus specific cost; property_coverage includes coverage description and cost; travel_coverage includes coverage details and cost; additional_services includes listed services and cost; total_budget includes both monthly and annual cost breakdown and extra details. Therefore, all 5 required items are fully specified with all necessary details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage3' for physical health, which corresponds most closely to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in the ground-truth ratings (physical_health rating 9). For mental health, it describes integrated coverage including psychiatry and family therapy; the best match is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mental_health (rating 9) because it includes specialized treatment programs and family therapy. Property coverage includes business and personal equipment up to €25,000 with electronics coverage, which matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under home_content (rating 9). Travel coverage mentions global protection with adventure sports and rescue services, which aligns with 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under travel_insurance (rating 10). Additional services list 24/7 support, telemedicine, emergency coordination—these match 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8) and possibly 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10) from travel_enhancement_services, but since travel coverage already includes adventure sports, we count only Telemedicine Services as explicitly separate. Therefore, the mapped items and their ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) 9, LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) 9, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property) 9, InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel) 10, and Telemedicine Services 8.
